title: Panang Spritz
description: A refreshing and flavorful herbal dish featuring panang curry paste, blanching vegetables, perfect for a show-off dinner option.

ingredients.name: Panang Curry Paste
ingredients.notes: Use vegetarian-friendly panang curry paste if available.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing the vegetables and cooking

ingredients.name: Pinch of Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: For a little kick in the blend

instructions: In a pan, heat the vegetable oil and add chopped garlic. Sauté for about 30 seconds or until fragrant.
Add the Panang Curry Paste to the sautéed garlic. Stir well to combine with the oil-paste mixture.
Pour in the Vegetable Stock or Water, cover, and let it simmer on medium heat for about 10 minutes or until reduced slightly.
Prepare your vegetables by washing them thoroughly and trimming any excess stems. Place them gently into the curry sauce for a few seconds to soften but not overcook.
Once all vegetables are blanched, remove from the pot and transfer to a bowl. Leave enough cooking liquid in the pan to keep the curry sauce warm.
To serve, ladle the hot curry sauce over the veggies. Garnish with fresh herbs for added flavor and presentation.
Optional: Serve alongside steamed or roasted vegetables or on its own as a light meal.
For a vegetarian-friendly option, ensure no meat products are used in any preparation steps.
